epigraph.quote: The Queen's Head, Foulsham, where we are staying, has 5 pigs in a paddock at the end of the pub garden/ campsite. Tonic is bemused.

moments.quote: The Castle is no longer there, but the church is very impressive.
Within 4 months ginkos were found sprouting in the ruins of Hiroshima in 1944.

images.caption: The church of St. Mary + All Saints, Fotheringay!

moments.quote: Horror of horrors! I had forgotten to bring extra loo paper.
Blakeney, which was by the sea according to the map, but infact we could scarcely see it because of mud flats.
After opening the campingvan curtains in the afternoon we saw a group of Dutch campers who had come on a course about making rammed earth houses.
In the evening we visited a boat yard on the river Yare. A company Sheerline who make river boats took a chad catalogue.
Tonic showed a return of youthful energy.
Annette gave us tea in the garden in pleasant sunshine.
